raise.title: Tell us what needs attention
raise.subtitle: Your complaint will be recorded and grouped with similar issues in your ward.

whatHappensNext.title: What happens next?
whatHappensNext.step1: You submit the complaint and receive a reference number.
whatHappensNext.step2: Staff review and group it with similar reports in your ward.
whatHappensNext.step3: You can track status anytime under My complaints.

draft.resumeBody: You have a saved draft from {{time}}.

voice.processingHint: Almost done — your words will appear in the description box.
voice.recordingHint: Describe the problem clearly — location, what is wrong, and since when.
voice.recordingHintCloud: Speak clearly — your voice is sent to Google Cloud Speech-to-Text for accurate transcription.
voice.recordingHintAuto: Speak in Hindi or English — we detect your language automatically.
voice.processingHintCloud: Google Cloud is converting your speech to text…
voice.levelHint: Bars move when your microphone picks up sound
voice.livePreviewEmpty: Your words will appear here as you speak…
voice.noSpeech: No speech was detected. Try speaking louder or move closer to the microphone.
voice.cloudFallbackHint: Cloud transcription is unavailable. Voice setup now uses your browser — tap Voice setup and try again.
voice.error: Could not transcribe. Try again or type your problem.
voice.apiDisabled: Speech-to-Text is not enabled on the server’s Google Cloud project. Ask your admin to enable the Cloud Speech-to-Text API.
voice.unsupported: Voice input is not supported in this browser.
voice.notSignedIn: Sign in to use voice input.

where.cityHint: Select the city where the issue is located.
where.cityApiHint: Ward list could not be loaded from the server. Start the Jankendra backend (port 8001).
where.wardHint: Choose the ward where the issue is located. Pinning on the map can auto-select the ward.
where.wardPrefilled: Pre-filled from your profile — you can change it.
where.wardDetectedNearest: Nearest ward from map pin: {{ward}} (please confirm)
where.locationPlaceholder: Near main market, Block C, opposite school…
where.locationHint: A clear landmark helps staff find the issue faster.
where.contactHint: We use your registered mobile number for status updates.

map.title: Pin location on map
map.hint: Search for a place, tap the map, or drag the pin to mark the exact spot.
map.tapHint: Tap anywhere on the map to drop a pin, or drag the pin to adjust.
map.addressHint: Address is filled from the map — you can edit it if needed.
map.searchError: Could not search locations. Try again or tap the map.
map.addressError: Pin saved, but address lookup failed. You can type the address manually.

geo.title: GPS location
geo.hint: Pin the issue on a map — saved locally until backend geo API exists.
geo.unsupported: Geolocation is not supported on this device.
geo.denied: Location access denied. Enter a landmark instead.

what.title: What type of problem?
what.subtitle: Select every category that applies — you can choose more than one.
what.multiSelectHint: Tap to select or deselect. At least one type is required.
what.subCategoryPrimaryHint: Sub-category applies to {{category}} (primary type for routing).
what.subCategoryHint: Pick the closest match — required for standard categories.

examples.water: e.g. no water supply, low pressure, contaminated water
examples.roads: e.g. potholes, broken footpath, damaged road
examples.drainage: e.g. blocked drain, standing water after rain
examples.electricity: e.g. power outage, broken street light
examples.health: e.g. mosquito breeding, clinic access, waste hazard
examples.sanitation: e.g. garbage not collected, open dumping

what.customCategoryHint: Required when you choose Other — tell us what type of issue this is.
what.customCategoryPlaceholder: e.g. street lighting, noise, park maintenance

details.descriptionHint: Include location, when it started, and how it affects residents.

quality.empty: Add a clear description to help staff act faster.
quality.short: Add a few more details — at least {{min}} characters.
quality.good: Good detail — staff can understand the issue.
quality.long: Description is quite long — consider keeping the most important points.

details.priorityHint: How urgently should staff address this?

photos.title: Photo evidence
photos.hint: Add up to 3 photos. Stored on this device until upload API exists.
photos.tooLarge: Each photo must be under {{maxKb}} KB.

similar.title: Similar reports in this ward
similar.body: {{count}} similar {{category}} report(s) already filed. Yours will be grouped with them so staff can act on the pattern.
similar.cluster: Up to {{count}} related reports in this cluster.

review.title: Review before submitting
review.subtitle: Check everything looks correct.
review.privacy: Your phone number is used only for complaint updates. It is not shown publicly.
review.submissionPreviewHint: This is what staff will see in the complaint description.

errors.categoryRequired: Please select at least one problem type.
errors.descriptionMin: Please provide at least {{min}} characters describing the issue.
errors.customCategoryRequired: Please describe the issue category when choosing Other.
errors.subCategoryRequired: Please select a sub-category for this issue type.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

confirmation.title: Complaint registered
confirmation.subtitle: Your complaint has been recorded. Save this reference to track progress.

detail.loadError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
detail.clusterCount: {{count}} related reports in this ward cluster

attachments.title: Photo attachments
attachments.previewNote: Saved on this device only until backend attachment API is available.
